plannedPrompts.prompt: Full-bleed landscape background for a premium digital gift card marketplace. Abstract fintech mood: soft gradients and subtle shapes in indigo (#6366f1) and purple (#8b5cf6) on a clean, light base. Designed to sit under a dark overlay; no text, no logos, no people. Modern, trustworthy, 16:9 suitable for full-bleed cover.
